info.title: Platyplus Coach API
info.description: Push planned sessions into a Platyplus account (rich indoor-execution detail). The coach dual-writes: the same `id` goes here AND to the intervals.icu event `external_id`, so Platyplus's Today merges them into one card (no duplicates). Authenticate with the per-user API token from Profile → Account.

post.summary: Create or update a planned session (upsert by id)
post.description: Idempotent: re-POST the same id to update it.

get.summary: List planned sessions
Get one plan
#438 — read the admin backlog TRIAGE overlay + app-added items. Session+admin.
get.description: The base item list comes from the bundled backlog.json (built from FEEDBACK-LOG.md); this returns JM's live triage + any app-added items, both stored on the admin record. { triage: { [n]: { status?, priority?, type?, comments?[] } }, added: [{ n, title, summary, at }] }.

post.summary: #438 — ADD a new backlog item from the app (title + optional type/summary). Session+admin.

put.summary: #438 — update one backlog item's triage: set/clear status (todo|build|done|discarded — OVERRIDES the .md status), priority (hi|med|lo), type (bug|feature|idea|chore), add/delete a comment. Session+admin.

get.summary: List calendar items (meal/mind/note/recovery/supplement) for the signed-in user
get.description: Session (cookie) auth — used by the app UI, not the coach API.

post.summary: Add/update a calendar item (assign a recipe / mind session to a day)
Import intervals.icu-origin planned workouts into Platyplus (Platyplus then owns them)

get.summary: #341/#268 — the athlete's location (weather + local time): saved, else the intervals athlete city (geocoded). { name, lat, lon, source, timezone }.

200.description: { name, lat, lon, source: saved|intervals|null, timezone }

post.summary: #341/#268 — set the athlete's location by CITY (geocoded for weather); bi-directionally WRITES the city back to the intervals athlete profile.

get.summary: #232 — the athlete's activity & changes log (append-only, capped): plan edits, coach actions, syncs. Most recent first.

200.description: AuditEvent[] { at, actor, action, target, detail, kind }

post.summary: #156 — detect recently-MISSED sessions (past plan, not completed) and let the coach reshape the week + remove the missed workout + notify with his explanation. Dedup via missedHandledAt; called on app load. Returns { missed }.
Push every Platyplus-origin plan in a window OUT to intervals (dedup-aware re-sync button, #150)

200.description: { total, created, linked, updated, errors } or { skipped }

get.summary: List the signed-in user's workout plans (session auth)

post.summary: Create/update a workout plan from the UI (also pushes to intervals.icu)

get.summary: List calendar items (meal/mind/note/recovery/supplement) — coach API (Bearer)

post.summary: Add/update a calendar item (meal/mind/note/recovery/supplement) — coach API (Bearer)

delete.summary: Delete a calendar item — coach API (Bearer)

get.summary: Search recipe library — coach picks a real meal id for fueling (Bearer)

200.description: [{ id, title, category, kcal, protein, minutes }]

get.summary: Search mind/movement library (meditation/yoga/pilates) — coach picks a session id (Bearer)

post.summary: Post a coach-activity notification to the athlete's bell (Bearer)
post.description: Call after creating/adjusting the plan or reviewing a workout, so a short note appears in the athlete's notification center.

title.description: one-line summary, e.g. 'Updated your training plan'

link.description: #233 optional in-app route to open on tap (e.g. /coach/<planId>)

post.summary: Trigger the in-app coach on demand with a custom instruction (Bearer)
post.description: Runs the locked-down coach (same as the auto-triggers) with a free-text task, e.g. re-author the week as structured workouts with tempo. Async (202).

400.description: message required / coach not set up

post.summary: Run the DAILY morning auto-adaptation now (Bearer, #367)
post.description: Fires the coach's daily plan-adaptation pass (normally scheduled ~4am local + a refine pass once HRV/sleep lands). 'pass' = 'early' | 'refine'. Async (202). Used for on-demand testing.

post.summary: Re-mirror all FUTURE plans to intervals (Bearer, #372)
post.description: Re-pushes every upcoming planned session to intervals.icu so they pick up server-side changes — notably the computed planned LOAD (icu_training_load), which intervals does NOT auto-derive for externally-created API workouts. No content change. Returns how many were synced.

post.summary: Coach sets the week's MACRO TARGET — load/hours/focus (Bearer, #254)
post.description: Stored on the athlete + mirrored to intervals as a TARGET event. cyclingcoach parity.

post.summary: Coach sets the MULTI-WEEK load periodization (ATP build/peak/recovery blocks) (Bearer, #394)
post.description: Stores `user.info.loadPlan` — the TOP-priority source the 4-week Load & Form forecast reads (#393), so the projection reflects the coach's plan. Returns an over-cap flag: a week beyond ~CTL×12 (weeklyLoadBudget.cap) is an intentional overload to name or ease. (Intervals load_target write-back is a deferred follow-up; the forecast reflects loadPlan directly.)

201.description: { ok, weeks, ctl, capPerWeek, band, overCap[] }

put.summary: Coach saves the athlete's threshold benchmarks (Bearer, #313)
put.description: Persists FTP / threshold pace / max-HR / LTHR (estimated from intervals history) so run %pace / ride %ftp targets resolve on the device. Mirrors to intervals.icu sport-settings.

tte.description: TTE (time-to-exhaustion at threshold) seconds — Platyplus benchmark #401, stored locally, not synced to intervals

put.summary: Coach saves its durable memory for the athlete (Bearer)
put.description: What the coach has learned works/fails + how the athlete likes to be coached. Read every session, updated after. Separate from the athlete profile.

get.summary: Coach checks connections + data flow (Bearer)
get.description: Returns whether intervals.icu/Strava are linked and whether data is actually flowing into intervals: recent activity count, latest activity (date/type/source), device sources feeding intervals, and whether HRV/sleep/resting-HR wellness is present. Used in onboarding to tell the athlete exactly what to connect.

post.summary: Coach marks onboarding complete (Bearer)
post.description: Call ONCE at the end of onboarding a new athlete, after the profile is saved and the first week is drafted. Sets onboardedAt so the app stops showing the 'set me up' prompt.

post.summary: Coach posts a post-workout REVIEW (Bearer) — Verdict/Execution/Body/Mind/Next from the cyclingcoach engine
post.description: Platyplus is master: the coach writes its COACHCHECK review here (not intervals). Keyed by date (+ optional planId/activityId); re-POST updates. Surfaced in-app.

takeaways.description: short bullets for the Progress card

201.description: review stored (and, if activityId + intervals connected, posted to the intervals Notes/comment thread in the Coach-note format — #290)

put.summary: Coach sets the PUBLIC title + description on a completed activity (Bearer) — syncs to Strava (#289)
put.description: Public-safe ONLY: workout/route/effort/conditions. Private context (score, health, next-plan) goes in /api/coach-review, not here. PUTs name/description onto the intervals activity.

400.description: bad id / no intervals connection / nothing to set

get.summary: Search exercise library — resolve names to exIds with demo media (Bearer)
Strava connection status (configured + scope)
Get the signed-in user's athlete coaching profile (engine-native markdown)

put.summary: Replace the signed-in user's athlete coaching profile (markdown, max 60k chars)

post.summary: A Platyplus-recorded workout finished → fan out to intervals (match-first, #122/#123)
post.description: Keeps the local Platyplus copy; checks intervals for a matching device activity (don't duplicate), else uploads a TCX built from the sample stream. No-op (local-only) when intervals isn't connected.

200.description: status: uploaded | matched | local-only | no-stream | error

post.summary: Parse an uploaded activity file (.fit/.gpx/.tcx) → summary + GPS track (#129)
post.description: Pure parse for manual-entry prefill — no storage, no intervals call. Returns sport, start, duration, distance, avg HR/power, elevation, calories, and a downsampled GPS track (hasGps=false when the file has no positions).

post.summary: Manual activity entry → fan out to intervals match-first (#129)
post.description: Local Platyplus copy is saved via /auth/logs; this fans out to intervals: uploads the raw file (best fidelity) or a summary TCX built from the entered totals. No-op (local-only) when intervals isn't connected.

post.summary: Admin: promote dev → prod by opening/reusing a dev→main PR + enabling auto-merge (uses GH_PROMOTE_TOKEN; Contents+PRs write, no actions:write needed).

200.description: PR opened/reused + auto-merge enabled (merges when the build check passes)

409.description: nothing to promote — prod already up to date

post.summary: Upsert today's daily check-in (energy/sleep/soreness, each 1-5; soreness 5=very sore). Optional `auto` {energy,sleep,freshness} records the auto scores shown → personal calibration (#207 Phase 2b)

get.summary: List the user's daily check-ins in a date range
Auto-derived readiness (Sleep/Freshness/Energy 1-5) from 60d intervals wellness + personal baselines (#195)

200.description: { connected, sleep, freshness, energy (null on cold start), cyclePhase (female: from intervals menstrualPhase or derived from the last period; NULL when pregnant, #422/#427), calibration (learned per-dim offsets, #207 Phase 2b), baseline, today }

get.summary: Forecast a FUTURE day's expected Freshness from planned load (projects CTL/ATL→Form). Only Freshness is forecastable ahead (#223)

200.description: { connected, future, available, date, daysOut, form, freshness (1-5), acwr, totalPlannedLoad, plannedDays }

get.summary: Per-day CTL/ATL/Form projection for the next N days from planned load — forward line on the Load & Form charts (#248)

200.description: { connected, available, dates[], loads[], ctl[], atl[], form[] }

get.summary: Pull the athlete's intervals.icu per-sport settings (ftp/maxHr/lthr/threshold_pace) + weight, mapped to Platyplus stats (#210)
Estimate the runner's threshold pace from intervals' pace curve (Critical Speed) — running eFTP, a suggestion to apply/override (#215)
Running endurance base (longest run + avg weekly km, last 6 wks) for the marathon-realism durability range (#216)
Per-week average run pace (sec/km, last 8 wks, weighted) for the Running pace-trend chart (#230)

put.summary: Set a per-sport stat and TWO-WAY sync it to intervals.icu (auto-push; modifies only that sport's sportSettings entry, custom fields untouched) (#210)

tte.description: TTE seconds — Platyplus benchmark #401 (stored locally, not synced)

get.summary: Coach reads the athlete's daily check-ins (energy/sleep/soreness) — recovery signal
Recent Strava activities (read; needs activity:read_all scope)
Read-through the user's recent intervals.icu wellness (Fitness/CTL, Fatigue/ATL, Form, resting HR, HRV, sleep, weight). Live, not stored. { connected:false } if unconnected.

Read-through the user's recently completed intervals.icu activities (id, duration/distance/HR/power/Load/RPE, indoor vs outdoor, plus reviewed/coachTick — the coach's reviewed-vs-pending tracker, #437). Live, not stored.

200.description: { connected, activities[] } — each activity: { id, date, type, indoor, minutes, km, avgHR, avgW, load, intensity, rpe, feel, name, reviewed, coachTick }

get.summary: #404 — the athlete's COMPUTED performance profile per sport, model-derived from their power/pace curve (no test). Cycling: { ftp, eftp, cp, wPrimeKj, tteSec, ef:{latest,trend,deltaPct}, profile:{type,badge,summary,tteMin,focus[]} }. Running: { thresholdPaceSec, csPaceSec, dPrimeM, tteSec, ef, profile }. { connected:false } if intervals isn't linked. Backs the MCP get_metrics tool so the coach reasons from real values.

#341 — the day's forecast + coaching guidance (heat derating, hydration, cold, wind, rain) for the athlete's location (Open-Meteo, free/no-key). Location is derived from recent GPS activities. { available:false, needsLocation:true } if unknown.

200.description: { available, date, feels, heat, flags[], notes[], summary }

get.summary: Recent Strava activities (Bearer; needs activity:read_all scope)

bearerAuth.description: Per-user API token (Profile → Account → API token).

cookieAuth.name: gymapp_sess
cookieAuth.description: Session cookie from /auth/login or passkey login (browser/UI only).

refId.description: catalog id of the recipe / mind session / etc.

Segment.description: One ride/run interval. power is % of FTP (ride) or % of threshold (run).

exId.description: optional Platyplus library id for the demo video

id.description: Shared id — also set as the intervals.icu event external_id.

ftp.description: ride only; defaults to athlete FTP if omitted
